name: Fuva Brain Limited
summary: Fuva Brain Limited develops and sells software products for end-point cyber security and white-collar productivity in Japan. The company also offers cyber security consulting services; and user support services. In addition, it resells network security products and offers related services. The company was formerly known as Ahkun Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fuva Brain Limited in October 2018. Fuva Brain Limited was founded in 2001 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
